content.hint: 结合专业与具体职业方向，避免模糊表达
content.situation: 在奖学金面试中，面试官询问你如何将所学专业应用于未来的职业发展
content.speakerText: How do you plan to apply what you're learning to your future career?
content.speakerTextCn: 你打算如何将你所学应用到未来的职业中？
content.knowledgePoint: 将学习与职业目标明确关联
content.responseTemplate: I'm aiming to ___ after graduation, and this program gives me the skills and network to make that happen.

content.hint: 具体化回馈方式，强调行动而非空泛承诺
content.situation: 面试官问你获得奖学金后，如何回馈你的社群或行业
content.speakerText: What will you contribute back once you've completed this program?
content.speakerTextCn: 完成这个项目后，你打算如何回馈？
content.responseTemplate: I want to ___ for students from underrepresented backgrounds in my field.

content.hint: 突出项目独特资源与个人目标的匹配性

options: a chance to meet famous people

content.situation: 面试官希望了解你选择该项目与长期愿景的关联
content.speakerText: Why is this specific program essential to your long-term goals?
content.speakerTextCn: 为什么这个项目对你的长期目标至关重要？
content.knowledgePoint: 阐明项目与个人愿景的专属关联
content.responseTemplate: This program is the only one that offers ___ which I need to achieve my vision.

content.hint: 表达‘创办’非营利组织的动词
content.template: I need this scholarship to focus on my thesis, and after graduation, I plan to ______ a nonprofit in my hometown.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：start a nonprofit（创办非营利组织）

content.hint: 表达‘制作’教育内容的动词
content.template: I’ll ______ free online content—videos and blogs—to help students from my country understand how to apply for scholarships.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：create online content（制作在线内容）

content.hint: 奖学金作为实现更大目标的‘工具’或‘基础’
content.template: This scholarship isn’t just about money—it’s a ______ to become a global leader in sustainable development.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：a platform to do something（实现目标的平台）
